name: photo-slideshow
description: Auto-advancing crossfade slideshow with navigation dots, arrow controls, touch/swipe support, and pause-on-hover. Replaces the inline script pattern.

data_attributes.data-slideshow: Marks the container. No value needed.

css_classes.slide: Each slide element — must be direct children of container
css_classes.slide-active: Added by script to visible slide
css_classes.slide-dots: Dot nav container — auto-appended after slideshow container

html_template: ❮ ❯

platform_notes.drupal: Use as Views slideshow or Media entity formatter with data attribute template override
platform_notes.wordpress: Native Gallery block wrapper with data attributes added via block filter
platform_notes.webflow: CMS Collection List with data-slideshow on wrapper div
